violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean drive up soda dispenser. -Clean lobby soda dispenser. -Clean ice cream and frozen drink dispenser.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean up inside fry warmer. -Clean hot hold racks.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Clean cups and straws area in lobby soda dispenser area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need cleaned thoroughly throughout kitchen and under equipment. -Walls need cleaned in kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ice cream dispenser tray needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean lower shelving in kitchen area. -Clean drain pipes below drive up soda dispenser. -Clean food hot hold rack. -Clean bread toaster rack cart. -Clean fronts, sides and wheel casters on kitchen equipment.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean drips on venthood surround more frequently.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceilings need more thorough cleaning in kitchen area, cooler and dry storage.
